Class ChatModelStreamAdvisor

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.ChatModelStreamAdvisor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Advisor, StreamAdvisor, org.springframework.core.Ordered
public final class ChatModelStreamAdvisor extends Object implements StreamAdvisor
A StreamAdvisor that uses a ChatModel to generate a streaming response.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Thomas Vitale
